name: python3-scipy
title: python3-scipy
description:
scientific tools for Python 3
SciPy supplements the popular NumPy module (python-numpy package), gathering a
variety of high level science and engineering modules together as a single
package.
.
SciPy is a set of Open Source scientific and numeric tools for Python. It
currently supports special functions, integration, ordinary differential
equation (ODE) solvers, gradient optimization, genetic algorithms, parallel
programming tools, an expression-to-C++ compiler for fast execution, and
others.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-scipy because scientific tools for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-scipy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-scipy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-scipy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
